channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Crash barrier appears to be cemented over - surely rendering it useless in a crash, 3rd April
item.description:
Crash barrier appears to be cemented over - surely rendering it useless in a crash. While A40 is closed surely all of this should be looked at and addressed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Road, Paddington, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near 42a Westbere Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Not sure if my last message went through, so just reiterating the issue of buses and construction vehicles going over the speed bump and making my and my neighbours’ houses shake badly. It’s particularly bad when they drive fast over the bump. Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Westbere Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers damaged and in roadway, for years, and with A40 closed these can be repaired, 3rd April
item.description:
Barriers damaged and in roadway, for years, and with A40 closed these can be repaired and reinstated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westway, Paddington, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple lights out in alley - Newington Court SE1 0DN, 3rd April
item.description:
Newington Court Road has multiple lights out along the arches creating a completely dark alley behind ministry of sound.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Newington Court, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping by local residents continues, 3rd April
item.description:
Local residents flytipping and blocking exit. Items now moved onto public path so it has to be picked up otherwise the junk is left by cleaners and refuse collection and more rubbish gets added in front of the exit gate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pitman Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several pot holes, 3rd April
item.description:
There are several pot holes at this location. They have been there for months and no one has done anything about them. They are getting bigger and bigger.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Parade, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 145 and 147 Cricklewood broadway, 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti and stickers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, Cricklewood, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge , furniture other rubbish Forest road, 3rd April
item.description:
There is a fridge ,old furniture, food,clothes dvd's & other rubbish adjacent to & behind large recycling bins by the bustop in Forest Road bus stop for Slade Green Train Station
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forest Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights turned 90 degrees, 3rd April
item.description:
One traffic light is turned 90 degrees, showing green/red to both directions through this intersection at the same time. Super dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151, Whiston Road, Haggerston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Dead fox on roadside, 3rd April
item.description:
No picture due to driving. Dead fox on curbside
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead

item.title: In pocket park hanging on railings by railing way line, 3rd April

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Parks)

item.title: Significant fly tipping, looks like kitchen parts, 3rd April
item.description:
Old kitchen removal waste in communal building area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Consort Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Lime bike abandoned on corner of Hardings Lane and Parish Lane, 3rd April
item.description:
Abandoned Lime bike NO: PMF-JJJ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime Bike, 3rd April
item.description:
Lime bike in Hardings Lane NO: MRR-TGD

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardings Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speedbump between 38-40 and 47-49 Westbere Rd, 3rd April
item.description:
Ever since the road was re-surfaced and re-bumped in Summer '25, we are experiencing shaking every time a heavy vehicle passes (noting that this is a bus route, and C11 buses pass very frequently). The entire house rattles, and we can feel it even from the back rooms away from the road. We worry that it scares our children, and that it may cause long term damage to our house. We ask for your kind help please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Westbere Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on utilities cabinet, 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on utilities cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood Vale, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Flytipped nitrous oxide canisters in garage area in front of 1-16 North Crofts

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lapse Wood Walk, Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Flytip, 3rd April
item.description:
Please collect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethelbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The is a sign pointing to The Club, 4 Bromley Road that shows we are a Public Toilet. We are not. According to Bromley Council site it should be pointing to 52 and 54 High Street. People come up to our front door urinating and worse., 3rd April
item.description:
A sign pointing to The Club says public toilets. We aren't a public toilet. The sign should be pointed to 52 and 54 High Street. People come up to our front door and urinate and worse too. Please arrange for this to he amended.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping large water dispenser, 3rd April
item.description:
Please collect the large white water dispenser left near the bike store just to the west of 1 Garnham Close along Garnham Street.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
